prompt: The URL parsing throws MalformedURLException. What is the bug?
choices: URL cannot hold paths with slashes
URL requires a protocol scheme (e.g., https://); without it, the constructor throws MalformedURLException
getHost() must be called after openConnection()
URL cannot be used for HTTPS — use HttpsURLConnection directly
explanation: A URL must include the protocol. "example.com/path" has no protocol scheme, causing MalformedURLException. Fix: new URL("https://example.com/path"). Valid schemes include http, https, ftp, file, etc.
